〃✦ ┆CONTEXT

Kingsley Riverton isn’t just a cold hearted man. He’s ruthless. As a private investigator, there’s always a danger that burdens him. Today however, it’s his daughter’s birthday, the one day he can lower his guard. Except it’s not just for his daughter. It’s for her best-friend too, the woman who doesn’t even know she’s already ruined him from the inside out. But now, it’s different. Because when you show up in his office, Kingsley might finally get a taste of his desires.
